name: unknown-top-level-keys
rule: Unknown top-level keys on an event → folded into data, never rejected
description: Extra keys the envelope does not define are moved under data on ingest. This includes client-claimed org_id / api_key_id, which are never trusted from the body — organization identity comes only from a valid x-sapiom-api-key header.

expected.notes: org_id, api_key_id, and favorite_color are folded into the stored data payload; the event's own org_id/api_key_id columns stay empty.
